subject: A vibrant orange-red fox leaping through a lush forested glen with waterfalls, tail glowing gold at the tip
description: A fox with a brilliant orange-red coat leaps dynamically through a rocky forest glen, front paws extended in mid-bound. Its tail trails behind with a faintly luminous golden quality at the tip, suggesting magical nature. The setting is lush and green — mossy boulders frame a rushing stream or waterfall below, while multiple cascading waterfalls are visible in the background among pine trees and cliffside rock faces. The lighting is soft and diffuse, giving the scene a bright daytime fairy-tale quality. Floating rocks appear in the far upper background, reinforcing the magical setting.
foreground: Leaping orange fox over rocky stream in forested glen
background: Mossy boulders, cascading waterfalls, pine forest, floating rocks
emotion: exuberant freedom — full sprint suggests joyful speed or mischievous escape
